title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 276.521 - Grain purchase contracts — form to be prescribed by director
text:
276.521.  Grain purchase contracts — form to be prescribed by director. — 1.  All purchases of grain shall be evidenced by a grain purchase contract.
  2.  The scale ticket prepared and delivered in accordance with section 276.516 may constitute a written grain purchase contract in the case of grain purchased and priced at the time of delivery of the grain.
  3.  All types of grain purchase contracts shall be in a  form as prescribed by the director.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1627 § 25)
